description: An observational cosmologist is preparing a James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) follow-up proposal for three massive galaxy clusters. For the targets listed in ~/Documents/jwst_lensing_proposal.txt, provide a 60s Luminance filter CCD pointing confirmation frame and a high-resolution Hubble palette sky reference image. All outputs must be organized into per-target subdirectories under ~/Lensing/ with a final observation log.
